stemHtml: Which of the these statements with regard to the landing gear down-lock mechanism is correct?

options.a: If necessary, the downlocks can be manually engaged.
options.b: The nose wheel does not need a down-lock mechanism.
options.c: In most cases, the down-lock mechanism utilises the overcentre principle.
options.d: The landing gear is usually locked in the down-lock position electrically.
